simp
  
  have h_inductive_step : ∀ (m : ℕ), (∑ k ∈ Finset.range m, (2 * k + 1)) = m ^ 2 → (∑ k ∈ Finset.range (m + 1), (2 * k + 1)) = (m + 1) ^ 2 := by
    intro m ih
    have h₁ : (∑ k in Finset.range (m + 1), (2 * k + 1)) = (∑ k in Finset.range m, (2 * k + 1)) + (2 * m + 1) := by
      rw [Finset.sum_range_succ, add_comm]
      <;> simp [add_assoc]
    rw [h₁]
    rw [ih]
    ring_nf
    <;> simp [pow_two, mul_add, add_mul, mul_comm, mul_left_comm, mul_assoc]
    <;> ring_nf at *
    <;> omega
  
  have h_main : (∑ k ∈ Finset.range n, (2 * k + 1)) = n ^ 2 := by
    have h : ∀ n : ℕ, (∑ k in Finset.range n, (2 * k + 1)) = n ^ 2 := by
      intro n
      induction n with
      | zero => simp
      | succ m ih =>
        apply h_inductive_step
        exact ih
    apply h
  
  exact h_main

simp

  apply h

    intro n ih
    have h₁ : (∑ k in Finset.range (n + 1), (2 * k + 1)) = (∑ k in Finset.range n, (2 * k + 1)) + (2 * n + 1) := by

    rw [h₁]

    <;> simp [pow_two]

  have h_main : (∑ k ∈ Finset.range n, (2 * k + 1)) = n ^ 2 := by

      | succ n ih =>

simp [Finset.sum_range_zero]
    <;> norm_num
  
  have h_inductive_step : ∀ (n : ℕ), (∑ k ∈ Finset.range n, (2 * k + 1)) = n ^ 2 → (∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (2 * k + 1)) = (n + 1) ^ 2 := by
    intro n ih
    have h₁ : (∑ k in Finset.range (n + 1), (2 * k + 1)) = (∑ k in Finset.range n, (2 * k + 1)) + (2 * n + 1) := by
      rw [Finset.sum_range_succ, add_comm]
      <;> simp [add_assoc]
    rw [h₁]
    rw [ih]
    have h₂ : n ^ 2 + (2 * n + 1) = (n + 1) ^ 2 := by
      ring_nf
      <;> omega
    rw [h₂]
    <;> simp [add_assoc]
  
  have h_main : (∑ k ∈ Finset.range n, (2 * k + 1)) = n ^ 2 := by
    have h : ∀ n : ℕ, (∑ k ∈ Finset.range n, (2 * k + 1)) = n ^ 2 := by
      intro n
      induction n with
      | zero =>
        simp [h_base]
      | succ n ih =>
        apply h_inductive_step
        exact ih
    exact h n
  
  exact h_main
